glosses.es: pasar la noche; quedarse a dormir
glosses.fr: passer la nuit; dormir sur place
glosses.vi: ngủ lại; ở lại qua đêm
glosses.ja: 泊まる; 夜を過ごす

translations.en: I would like to stay here overnight.
translations.es: Me gustaría quedarme aquí esta noche.
translations.fr: Je voudrais passer la nuit ici.
translations.pt: Gostaria de passar a noite aqui.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn ở lại đây đêm nay.
translations.hi: मैं यहाँ आज रात ठहरना चाहता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya ingin menginap di sini malam ini.
translations.ro: Vreau să stau aici peste noapte.
translations.ja: 今夜ここに泊まりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of 'mögen') expressing polite desire; finite verb selecting the infinitive complement.
Locative adverb indicating place; modifies the verb phrase.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

translations.en: We can stay the night at your place.
translations.es: Podemos quedarnos en tu casa esta noche.
translations.fr: On peut passer la nuit chez toi.
translations.it: Possiamo passare la notte da te.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 네 집에서 잘 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们可以在你家住一晚。
translations.yue: 我哋可以喺你屋企住一晚。
translations.pt: Podemos passar a noite na sua casa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có thể ở lại nhà bạn tối nay.
translations.hi: हम आज रात तुम्हारे घर पर ठहर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να μείνουμε στο σπίτι σου απόψε.
translations.id: Kita bisa menginap di rumahmu malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi kan sova hos dig i natt.
translations.ro: Putem sta la tine peste noapte.
translations.ja: 今夜あなたの家に泊まれます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary of ability/permission; finite verb selecting the infinitive complement.
Preposition governing the dative; indicates location 'at/with' someone.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; object of the preposition 'bei'.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

translations.en: She wants to stay overnight at the hotel.
translations.es: Ella quiere pasar la noche en el hotel.
translations.fr: Elle veut passer la nuit à l'hôtel.
translations.it: Lei vuole passare la notte in hotel.
translations.pt: Ela quer passar a noite no hotel.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn ở lại khách sạn qua đêm.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تبقى في الفندق الليلة.
translations.nl: Ze wil in het hotel overnachten.
translations.hi: वह होटल में आज रात ठहरना चाहती है.
translations.el: Θέλει να μείνει στο ξενοδοχείο απόψε.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să stea la hotel peste noapte.
translations.ja: 彼女はホテルに泊まりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative (feminine here by agreement with 'will'); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing volition; finite verb selecting the infinitive complement.
Contraction of preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative singular); marks static location for the following noun.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular; denotes the location.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Heute müssen wir im Zelt übernachten.

translations.de: Heute müssen wir im Zelt übernachten.
translations.en: We have to sleep in the tent tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche tenemos que dormir en la tienda de campaña.
translations.fr: Ce soir, nous devons dormir dans la tente.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们得在帐篷里过夜。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚要喺帳篷入面瞓覺。
translations.ru: Сегодня ночью мы должны ночевать в палатке.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite temos que dormir na tenda.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi phải ngủ trong lều.
translations.ar: الليلة علينا أن ننام في الخيمة.
translations.nl: Vannacht moeten we in de tent slapen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вночі ми повинні спати в наметі.
translations.hu: Ma éjjel a sátorban kell aludnunk.
translations.hi: आज रात हमें तंबू में सोना होगा.
translations.pl: Dziś w nocy musimy spać w namiocie.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ πρέπει να κοιμηθούμε στη σκηνή.
translations.nb: I natt må vi sove i teltet.
translations.id: Malam ini kita harus tidur di tenda.
translations.sv: I natt måste vi sova i tältet.
translations.ro: În noaptea asta trebuie să dormim în cort.
translations.cs: Dnes v noci musíme spát ve stanu.
translations.da: I nat skal vi sove i teltet.
translations.fi: Tänä yönä meidän täytyy nukkua teltassa.
translations.ja: 今夜はテントで寝なければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sets the time frame for the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing obligation/necessity; finite verb selecting the infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem' (dative singular); introduces a prepositional phrase giving location.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular; denotes the location.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.
